title: Canada Revenue Agency service fees - Fees reports and related information - Canada.ca
content:
## Canada Revenue Agency service fees - Fees reports and related information
This page includes the annual Canada Revenue Agency Fees reports, as well as information on how remissions (refunds) to clients are made when service standards are not met.
- 2024 to 2025 fees report
- 2023 to 2024 fees report
- 2022 to 2023 fees report
- 2021 to 2022 fees report
- 2020 to 2021 fees report
- 2019 to 2020 fees report
- 2018 to 2019 fees report
- 2017 to 2018 fees report

## Remissions (refunds) information
- Remissions for service fees

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
